stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced accelerated production of its Blackwell AI chips amid surging demand from hyperscalers. Economically, this signals sustained capex in AI infrastructure, boosting GDP growth via tech investment. Market psychology: FOMO drives buying as investors fear missing AI boom. Historical parallel: Similar to 2023 H100 shortage rally. Analogies: 1. Like oil rigs during 1970s boom; 2. Gold rush miners striking new veins.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show headlines on Blackwell ramp-up; X sentiment (20 latest posts) 85% positive with high engagement on AI dominance. Consensus analyst upgrades.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long NVDA for 10-15% upside in 1 week on momentum; target $150.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short against resistance at 52w high, potential 5% drop if supply glut fears.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Chip delay rumors resurfacing, broader semi selloff, overvaluation at 70x P/E.

stocks.justification: Strong multi-source confirmation from news and X buzz, historical patterns match.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla reported Q1 deliveries beating estimates by 5%, fueled by Cybertruck ramp. Implications: EV adoption accelerates, pressuring legacy autos. Psychology: Cult following amplifies gains. Parallels: 2020 delivery beat +30% surge. Analogies: 1. Rocket launch success; 2. Sports team upset win sparking fan frenzy.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Recent X posts (limit 20, latest) show delivery hype, Elon Musk tweets boosting sentiment; news confirms China factory output.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 12% gain to $290 on robotaxi hype continuation.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short on valuation bubble, possible 8% pullback.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Margin compression from price cuts, regulatory hurdles for FSD.

stocks.justification: Solid delivery data but high valuation tempers certainty.

stocks.impact_theory: Apple unveiled Vision Pro 2 with AI integration, driving upgrade cycle. Economic boost to supply chain; psych: Ecosystem lock-in. Parallels: iPhone launches. Analogies: 1. New iPhone model fever; 2. Blockbuster sequel hype.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X semantic search reveals positive AR/VR buzz; web news on pre-orders.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Minimal, but antitrust risks for 4% dip.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: China sales slowdown, competition from Meta Quest.

stocks.justification: Product launch reliable but adoption pace uncertain.

stocks.impact_theory: Azure AI revenue +50% YoY reported in preview. Implications: Cloud/AI monopoly strengthening. Psych: Safe mega-cap bet. Parallels: 2023 OpenAI tie-up. Analogies: 1. Fortress walls reinforced; 2. Oil well gusher.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: High X engagement on Copilot growth; analyst notes positive.

stocks.impact_theory: AMD launches MI300X rival to NVDA, gaining hyperscaler share. Econ: Competition lowers AI costs. Psych: Underdog rally. Parallels: 2017 Epyc CPU gains. Analogies: 1. Challenger brand breakthrough; 2. Runner-up scoring big.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X keyword search shows #AMDvsNVDA trending positively; news on deals.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 15% to $190 on market share gains.

stocks.justification: Promising but NVDA shadow reduces confidence.
